ravi.label: View all records
ravi.desc: Ravi can see all your uploaded medical documents

ravi.label: View selected categories
ravi.desc: Ravi can see prescriptions and lab reports only

ravi.label: Upload documents
ravi.desc: Ravi can upload documents on your behalf (requires approval)

ravi.label: Activity notifications
ravi.desc: You get notified when Ravi views or uploads anything

sharma.label: View shared group
sharma.desc: Dr. Sharma can see documents you share to this group

sharma.label: Upload on your behalf
sharma.desc: Clinic can upload documents; you approve before they're saved

sharma.label: Upload notifications
sharma.desc: You get notified when the clinic uploads anything

sharma.label: Audit trail
sharma.desc: Every access by the clinic is logged in your activity

priya.label: Mutual record access
priya.desc: Both you and Priya can view each other's shared records

priya.label: Priya can upload
priya.desc: Priya can upload documents; you approve before they're saved

priya.label: Activity notifications
priya.desc: You get notified when Priya views or uploads anything

priya.label: Emergency access
priya.desc: Priya can request a one-time emergency view of all records
